name: Tortellini Primavera
recipeIngredient: 9 ounces cheese tortellini, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir mushrooms, onion, and garlic in margarine in a large skillet.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (except tortellini) to the skillet; mix well.
3. Cook until the mixture just begins to boil, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the tortellini; cook until thoroughly heated.
